scripts.build:prod: yarn build:packages && yarn build:components && yarn build:webapp && yarn build:examples
scripts.build: yarn build:packages && yarn build:components && yarn build:webapp
scripts.build:packages: yarn workspace @casehub/pages-iframe-api run build && yarn workspace @casehub/pages-echarts-base run build && yarn workspace @casehub/pages-iframe-dev run build && yarn workspace @casehub/pages-component run build && yarn workspace @casehub/pages-data run build && yarn workspace @casehub/pages-ui run build && yarn workspace @casehub/pages-viz run build && yarn workspace @casehub/pages-runtime run build
scripts.clean: yarn workspaces foreach -Apt run clean || true
